text: T Mobile is the worst company for customer service. I fell for a "deal" which turned out to be less than ideal. Turns out the "free phone" is really not free. I was not happy with the service and terminated the plan. A few months later I got a bill for last 2 months of service, which I paid. The customer service rep neglected to tell me that there was a balance due for early termination. I've since learned that customer service reps do not have access to complete account info, which seems like a waste of time. I would not recommend T Mobile. Don't believe in "great deals".

I purchased 2 new s22 ultra phones but there was a back order delay.  No worries 

But once the phones came in, so did the issues

Took a long time to get them connected to server because the phones were missing EID number which Is normally located on sim card. 
Both phones were sent without sim

So a long wait on phone to get someone who couldn't assist and I was pass to a few different reps. 
Then after 4 hours got phone up and running.2nd phone took 3.5 hours to sort out. 

I asked of tmobile to try and make right of this to keep customer happy but they xould not assist

I've been a loyal customer never a late payment. And always upgrade my phones. 

The fact that they couldn't give me something for my troubles definitely didn't sit right with me. 

Cheap plans I agree but customer service is not up to par at all

If you only understand English customer  service is horrific. After three calls I finally went to a 
T-Mobile store and my problem was taken care of by an English speaking kid. Nothing against foreign people. I just can’t understand broken English.

Cell service terrible. Call fails constantly. Also, I gave them my 2 iPhone 8 and bought 2 new iPhone 13. That set it up on 24 months. I only kept phones for a week because of cell phone drops. Asked to close out my account and pay for iPhones but they said I had to pay full price for the phones and kept my 2 iPhone 8. 
Actually stole them and gave me no credit for them.  They said would give 400 for each phone but all lies. Would not give my iPhones back to me although I paid full price for new phones. Only had service for 1 week because of constant dropped calls. Also I only had 2 lines and they set it up for 4 to make extra commissions I assume. Would never use or recommend T-Mobile.

This company is a fraud. They sold me a phone that was supposed to fix my signal. Still no credit for promotional offer after 3 mos. No tower booster, cell tower not worked for months and all I get are lies and excuses.

Absolutely horrible!!! Customer service is the worst service I ever experienced in my life!! I tried there 14 day free trial and after a few days I didn't want the service so I decided to cancel it! I called into customer service and they said they canceled it for me but a few days later they billed me for a whole month after I had cancelled it! And I got a hold of customer service again and then they tried to tell me there never was a 14 day free trial!

Just a Pack a lies ordered a new phone first time with this carrier been with Verizon for 7 years but I fell for the ads about 5G so I ordered the phone April 18th it is now June but still no phone,  I am getting a monthly bill though so I am paying for service I don't Have

Absolutely worst phone service. All the workers there are mentally re-tarded or inbred, they will mess your bill up three times a month and then have someone who barley understands English say "sorry so sorry" over and over again. The service is absolute trash like the people they hire. I wouldn't even waste the time looking into the services. They over charge you so you can experience their worst service. I hope this place goes out of business. Monkeys could run a better company.

Sprint.  
It's hard to make AT&T look good, but they achieved it.

DO NOT USE T-MOBILE THEY HAVE THE WORST SERVICE EVER AND THE CUSTOMER SERVICE IS HORRIBLE. I HAD VERIZON FOR EVER I WENT TO T-MOBILE FOR A WEEK AND THE SERIVE WAS TERRIBLE. I WENT BACK TO. VERIZON WITHIN THE 14 DAYS TIME FRAME TO RECEIVE MY FULL REFUND. LONG STORY SHORT T-MOBILE CHARGE ME OVER 200 DOLLARS IN SERVICE AFTER I CANCEL MY SERVICE WITHIN THE 14DAYS TIME FRAME AMD REFUSED TO GIVE ME MY FULL REFUND!!!!! THEY CHARGED ME FOR THE WHOLE MONTH WHICH I HAD SERVICE WITH ANOTHER CARRIER

For the past 1.5 months T-mobile's "experts" cannot resolve a simple problem. Access to my account. F451 their error message states "oops something went wrong. Crossed wires.. please try back later". That "later" has not happened in 45 days. Thanks to the "experts" who cannot even figure out what their own network's error message is. Not sure who trains them - they are like a bunch of robots who all repeat the same thing - I can pretty much tell them what they are going to say. T-mobile should not be in the business since they cannot provide decent service on  anything - including accessing your own account.

Horrible customer service. Just this week I have been “misinformed” three times and hung up on. And I still don’t have cell service. This is how they treat a customer who has been with them for 10 years? Just wow!

The absolute worst cell phone company out there . The Joe Biden loving communist deplorables are spying, lying, thieving crooks!. And they will rip you off intentionally. I paid over $150.00 for a moble hot spot, it never worked. When I went to return it to the store I purchased it from, they refused to give me a refund, claiming it to be done thru Cust service, when I called them, they promised me a check by mail within 10 business days,, did not happen. When I called again, they promised a check in the mail within 10 business days again...  That 10 days has long passed also . Not to mention, the employees at the store I bought, and requested a refund at, we're very rude and shady.. at the beginning, a female employee said she was the store manager,but when customer service told me to get the managers name, a man stepped in between us and said he was the manager . .. shady as hell. This store is in the Bear valley shopping center, Denver, Colorado.. store #2270

Worst customer service everrrrrrr
Calling five times to release my account 
And not getting anything done..
Very stupid 
Very stup

their customers service is the worst I've ever dealt with on the planet lie to you to get you to buy their product and get you off the phone cost me almost $10.000 over a tracking system they do not keep their word this has turned into a law suit
Terrible service at mt prospect store on Kensington.  Waiting 1 hour  for a screen protector

T-Mobile I have been with this carrier for 7 years. SEVEN. My phone broke back in May. They replaced it, I shipped back the broken samsung (screen not working). They started by saying they didnt receive the package, then I showed them it was delivered to their dock, oh ok it just hasn't been scanned no worries. I see a charge of over 1000 on my bill! Oh, ok sorry no worries, were still looking for the phone or maybe it hasn't been scanned, you wont be charged. Today: "The fact of the matter is the package may show delivered but the phone is not here so the charges stand, maybe the box was sent empty or you sent the wrong phone." They offered me a 100 dollar refund on  over 1000 dollars they are trying to charge me for a broken phone that was delivered to their dock. You think Im gonna pay you 1000 dollars for a broken phone that clearly shows was delivered at your location when people are struggling to get utilities paid because sone fool at your warehouse made a mistake?!  Im DONE WITH T-MOBILE. NEVER AGAIN. 
#poorcustomerservice #thirstyformoney
#corporategreed

I have T mobile+Sprint,did a review on asurion the other day it was bad of course! It would not be right to let Sprint + T mobile off the hook since they peddle this ins. More than likely own or have a big stake in the company! So if your having problems with asurion honoring claims do not expect any backing from them! They sold me the 360 protection and made it sound real good! My best advice is don't buy it! It's a scam and their getting away with it! Buy your phone from an electronic store and use their extended coverage,you will be glad you did!
Also check out reviews on asurion before saying yes! A whole lot of 1 stars! Actually I would have given a minus 10 if there was an option! But the review I gave speaks volumes!
By the way T mobile and Sprint costumer service are the worst! I actually called T mobile corporate no help or concern for costumer what so ever!
By the way I am a 20 yr Sprint customer but definitely not proud of saying that though just gave that info to let you know your loyalty to them means nothing!!!

Over 2 calls of 2.5 hours plus was trying to open a new account. A lot of this time was spent on hold. 1st call ran into a road block when they could not complete manual credit review because their computers were down. Was promise a call back soon, did not received any call back over the next 24 hours. I then place a call myself and was contact to a person who was new and did not know what do with my call. finally she ask someone and we got to someone to start the manual credit review. This was completed in a few minutes and was sent back to finalize the account. At this point I ask the agent to review the terms of the complete account. The terms she reviewed with were greatly difference then what I was given on the 1st call by $200 dollars. I asked to be speak to the mid level supervisor, after a number minutes on hold again she told me none was available. I ask to have the supervisor call me, at 72 hours plus out no one has called me.
What a 1st impression! I do not recommend T-Mobile!!

A person on my account was in a pickle tonight and needed the recent call info on his line.  So easy-peasy to get to this kind of information - in fact, ANY information you need about your phone service.  Also, if I had needed to call for assistance the local team for our region is terrific and will stay with you through any issues pertaining to your phone and phone service.  I've been a customer for 20 years and wouldn't switch for anything.  This may sound solicited - it's not!  Of all my "utility" and "communications" services I rate T-Mobile  "best of class."

Been a Verizon customer for a decade. Bought into the 5g hype. Moved to T.Mobile. worst move I've ever made. T.Mobile techs from basic to top tier techs is reboot phone. Come on guys. Get it together. This company will throttle you back even if you have the max plan. Won't stream more than 3 minutes without the loading circle. Trying to watch a simple sporting event.

All I wanted to do was change my service to a new phone. I could not do it myself as I have an e-sim card and not a physical one. After almost two hours on the phone with two different "specialists" I had gotten precisely nowhere. I then went to a T-Mobile brick and mortar and it was accomplished in less than five minutes. Two stars and not one because someone at T-Mobile got it done, but the people they have helping in their call center were useless.
They do not honor there warranty bought my phone less than a year ago and paid for the tempered glass,no longer have them in stock

All 5G is down in south central Delaware. I’m in 5G coverage but barely have 1 bar LTE last 2 days, if anything at all. They tell me they’re “enhancing” the network. BS, been hearing that for 4 years! Incoming calls never connect, outgoing calls drop, texts and web pages freeze, paid music and streaming apps are totally dysfunctional. I’m losing money every day because of crappy T-Mobile service. Why are you billing me for NO SERVICE? #refund

I had Verizon for 10+ years. I finally got tired of the price increases. It seemed the more the price went up, the worse service I received. I researched all phone companies and finally went with T-Mobile. I'm so glad that I did. They have come a long way over the years. Although I've only been with them for a few weeks, my phone has not missed a beat.
Absolutely trash 5g if you're anywhere except a huge city! I'm 5 minutes from Asheville, N.C. with one bar clicking 2... everywhere I go with this hotspot is garbage service!

Short and sweet: T Mobile coverage in my area is not the greatest. For beinging on the internet, talking on the phone and texting. I have had to hit send up to 5 times sometimes to get a text to go through.
Customer service is awesome!!! Best I've ever experienced with any provider. So there it is.

T-Mobile's service is the same as anybody else's what makes the difference is how they operate. T-Mobile in a short word sucks, don't ever buy a phone from them and change service and expect to use the same phone for your new carrier because it isn't going to happen. T-Mobile locks your phone like they own it even though you paid for it and there is no way that customer service can unlock it and if you go to their unlock app it doesn't work either. I bought a new phone from them but then found service for half the price so I dumped them and now I have to go buy a new phone because they won't unlock the one I already have. So good luck with just another rip-off company who has to make sure they scam you for every penny they can possibly get.

I'm writing this after several months of going back and forth with customer service representatives for hours, sending multiple accessories back and forth and getting charged for an item that I was never supposed to have paid for in the first place, which was my last straw.

Tmobil service is garbage. Their data breach last August left my personal information on the internet, I had to cancel checking account, freeze credit because my SS was also made vulnerable. At the time they assured me that this wasn't the case, but it was verified by a third party ID monitoring subscription I got afterward, not like the fake-ass 'partnership' they hastily made up with McAfee, which was totally worthless.

They don't stand by the devices they sell to service them, they give ridiculous corporate doublespeak any time a real issue comes up and I've had it. Looking for a different provider as I'm fed up.

To think a company that started out so well is screaming down hill at an alarming speed.  10 years ago the service was adequate and the cost to switch over seemed right.  Since then, the customer service is terrible both at the brick and mortar stores and technical service online.  Seems like the more technical people you talk to on the phone, the more of a variety answers you're going to get.  They also don't document your phone calls well so when you call back and get a different technician, you have to explain the problem all over again.  With all the talk about modernization to the towers and 5G, my data speeds have slowed to 3G if I even get a signal.  Generally all phone company's suck and are over priced.  T-mobile cell service has been very disappointing over the past year and I hope they get their act together soon.

For years, with Verizon. Grandfathered in with unlimited data on phone and iPad. Customer service at store in ft oglethorpe GA bites. Decided to change provider. T-Mobile over 50 yrs old, $50. Transferred. Within 1 week, iPad 2G used, cut off. Only used iPad for googling and candy crush. Went to store. Package changed. Had issues with having to manually reset phone and iPad settings on daily basis for internet connection. Back to store. Was offered home wi fi, 2 wk free trial. Still having internet connection issue. Called, package changed again, increasing price. Bill coming due. Was charged $50 wi fi, only one week into 2 week trial. Called again. Plan changed again. Wow, my text wouldn't send to my mom, but I could call. Back to store. 25 minutes later, i can text my mom. Now I see on bill being charged for FREE phone.

Since I've left Verizon due to bad attitude customer service, going back, but I'm sure I'll not get my same package, no longer available.
Tip for consumers:
T-Mobiles set up requires gmail. Most difficult changing to yahoo email after being made to have gmail account.

Products used:
Moto stylus & ipad

Justice  (842) from Pottsville store was wonderful.... Justice explain everything and  perfect gentlemen
Thank you

T-mobile is the absolute worst cell and internet service provider in the universe. I’m not exaggerating either. They blatantly lie about having 5G, for example the magenta max “deal” you’re supposed to get 5G on two iPhones and it will be around $100 per month total, so we were given 2 iPhone 11s and we also purchased a WiFi cylinder for what was supposed to be $30 per month (it’s not even worth a dollar) and ended up being over $50 even though the first month was supposed to be free, another lie. The employees in store are about as useless as it gets, they know nothing yet claim to know everything and have everything taken care of. My phone service other than calling didn’t work a single bit for the first month, so I was literally paying for a phone that doesn’t work and could’ve gotten a dollar store phone that worked better for 95% cheaper. The people on the phone for T-Mobile do not speak English and are extremely useless and don’t listen in the slightest, they are even rude and careless. I actually spent 1 hour on the phone between being on hold and arguing with a rep about my phone not working and them claiming I haven’t paid my bill from an account that an in store rep set up (we already had a different account) They wanted, INSISTED, that we pay for an ACCOUNT that said we had these two phones when we had already paid for the ones we actually had even though we’d had this new account for literally two weeks and my phone had not even worked yet. This broad argued with me saying that it doesn’t matter if we have nothing to do with that account, if we want our stuff turned back on, (again even though we had already paid for everything) then we must pay for this account that has the same stuff on it, so an actual duplicate account. She repeated this over and over saying that it doesn’t matter. 99% of the people associated with T-Mobile are worthless and useless, the service even more so. It is 2022 and a half, there is absolutely no excuse for having WiFi that doesn’t work and cell service that is even worse no matter where you are. Also T-mobile doesn’t actually have 5G. Maybe in LA or NYC, but they say “oh you mustn’t live near a tower” when there are actually none. You will get 4g at the best of times which is horrible LTE and even 3g with at&t is infinitely better. So they are lying to your faces and keeping info from you until they get you hooked up to a contract. 
Edit: I forgot to mention that I had spent a collective amount of around 3 entire days of my life in that godforsaken store, to get absolutely nothing at all accomplished. My theory is that the stores are literally just for purchasing stuff, if you actually need help with something or services then you’re shiz out of luck. T-mobile also takes advantage of the elderly, exactly like auto garages 
DO NOT GET ANYTHING FROM T-MOBILE, PLEASE THIS IS YOUR WARNING

T mobile is not a company you should use for your service. I pay so much money every two weeks and still never catch up and I got the same service with metro and boost mobile for only $60 a month. They don't tell you that you can qualify to pay half your bill if you get snap or medi cal. In the last 3 weeks I've paid them over $210 and they wanted another $70 yesterday. My phone will be shut off on Thursday. I can take that $70 &go to boost or metro and get set up and my bill will always be only $60 per month. Do not use t mobile!

I must have internet service.  My job depends on it.
Ive expressed this to the customer service folks more then 12 X, and more than 10 hrs on the phone.  Lip service.  "oh yes, we understand...."  Thats great!  Now,  can you fix it?   Service goes off line every hour.  sometimes it stays on more than an hour.  Im on my 3rd modem, have had the trashcan and now arcadia.  Changed cell towers, reset to factory, upgraded the firmware, changed power outlets,  added fans, marked a pentagram on the ground and sacrificed goats and chickens.  Customer service is nice, but the modem wont stay online.  We had 4 mos. of excellent service, now crap.

My first time at the Jacksonville, Ar TMobile location. As soon as I walked in, I was not greeted. One customer service representative was currently helping two customers didn't even look up to notice whether there was a customer,or not.  The other manager steps out of his office w/ still no greeting. This was just the tip of the iceberg in my building frustration(s) Their behavior wasn't the only thing that truly angered me. I had been there about 10 minutes before I'd decided, I'd had enough. You're not the only ones w/ things to do.  I'm a paying customer, who wanted to switch my service from att to TMobile but my guess is now that either my race, my gender, or just whatever the case may have been... they had a problem with. I don't know!!! Maybe it was the weather being that it was 100 degrees outside at the time of my departure. I'm just highly pissed. Really had high hopes of transferring my service. I'll never do business w/ TMobile ever at least not the one located in Jacksonville AR. I later went to TMobile in North Little Rock. Greeted me as I came thru the door. Treated me as a valued potential customer. Looking forward to doing business w/ them in the near future.

I decided to try T-Mobile internet but changed my mind after bad reviews and returned the box unopened within 6 days ( had 14 days to decide without being charged) and waited while the salesperson  in the store assured me I would not be charged for any service.  Guess what?  My first bill after changing phone service from Sprint to T-Mobile charged me for the internet service that I never had!!!  They made it sound so simple and guaranteed that if you changed your mind within 14 days, you would not receive a bill after cancelling.  It took over an hour in store for the salesperson to cancel the order.  He was even frustrated with their service, being transferred five times before supposedly cancelling my service order.  Wow!!  Their own employees can’t get an adequate response.  I was assured the service was cancelled with no future bills, but  I got billed  anyway!!  Also, since I changed to T-Mobile, my internet browsing is bad, showing numerous errors when trying to connect.  The employee that I talked to about this said they are working on towers in my area.  But, they like to brag about wonderful service with 5G.  Advertising something that has not yet happened in my opinion!  I wish they never bought Sprint!!

I have been with my phone provider (T-Mobile) for 14 years and back in April 2022, I contacted them for an upgrade to my phone. I was pleasantly surprised about the offer the rep was telling me: buy-one/get-one-free. The rep. also told me that due to my long-lasting relationship with them, I was able to get a new line FOR FREE and I took advantage of it. "Accepted" the free line and purchased the phones. I offered the free line to my son that was under another carrier and we did the transfer. With the transfer completed, they also offered to pay for the balance of the other carrier balance and I was hyper with the treatment I was given.
Long story short, when I got my bill, I got charged $20 for the new line. Also, on the other hand, when I tried to submit the refund for the other carrier bill, the system was kicking me out. It happened until one month passed and now they claimed that the time to submit expired, despite my constant calls and follow-ups. About the line, they "explained" that I had to purchase two lines, but it was not what the rep. told me, as if that was the case, my decision would have been different. 
I think it's time for me to move away from T-Mobile as this had happened in the past and I "accepted" the circumstances but I think I just had it and will not tolerate more abuses from this company.

I canceled my account with T-Mobile over a month ago. Recently got charged again by T-Mobile due to an active line on the account I was gifted but never used... so I called customer service. They said they could not access my account without a pin/acct #, but did confirm that the account said "closed" on it. We got charged again... My wife went into a T-Mobile store to see what was going on and they explained the extra line was still active, but since she was not the owner of the account, I just needed to call in and request that it be fully closed. So I called again... same thing... no pin/account # so they can't verify my account. They could also not send a temp pin to my phone number because that number is now with my new provider. I offered my birthday/email/all phone numbers on the account/SSN... but no they could not cancel the live number. The manager I spoke with went by "Kath" whom put no effort into rectifying the situation outside of asking me to guess the pin number I set years ago. Worst customer service experience of my life. This place needs help.

Worst customer service ever. I have been with sprint for 16 plus years. My phone/service worked great until last week. I was told I had to allow T-Mobile to put a sims card in my phone was told it would be quick and simple. Well that was a lie. The sims card caused my phone to crash and you guessed T-Mobile will not take responsibility. Once I got my phone up and running I next found I have zero service at our property. T-Mobile claims they are the best. You mean your the best at crashing customer phones and then you say your the best in coverage. Please explain how I had coverage at the property under sprint but with T-Mobile zero service. How is that the best in coverage. I learned if something isn’t broke don’t mess with it. Thank you T-Mobile thank for braking my stuff and worthless  service. This loyal sprint customer is now off to find a different provider. Loyalty just doesn’t pay anymore
Worst service I've ever had

All carriers have flaws, but T-Mobile has THE BEST CUSTOMER SERVICE. If you’re at work, they’ll help you through text!!  Everyone has problems with internet, but not all carriers put as much effort into helping customers as T-Mobile. These poor ratings must be old ones, as it’s not fair when I’ve had the best experience ever with customer service!
The worst mobile company! Do not use tmobile.  Zero! At their best!!!!
EVER SINCE customer service crossed borders this Company is a total disaster, every year they just get worse and worse... !!!!! I hope they go out of business.

I ordered a T-Mobile phone plan and was immediately charged an activation fee.  UPS lost the phone.  I never got it.   I've been trying for weeks to get back the activation fee they shouldn't have charged me. I'm being ignored. Never again!  BEWARE!It
Worst company I’ve ever had… literally scam

I thought Verizon was bad. T-Mobile won’t talk to me, they just keep charging me for services I don’t  have, I’ve called to cancel, and they just disconnect the call 15 minutes into it be sure they’re a greedy  and unethical  little  b@@ch. I told them I don’t care about a credit score, I’ll just include them in my bankruptcy, this is when the call ended, but my services still work, so I assume they’re continuing to charge me. How is this legal? because the system is designed in their favor. Why do they get away with this theft? because we the consumer enable it and are ultimately spineless. I can’t be the only one fed up with these billion dollar corporations who can’t conduct business fair or ethically and it’s ALWAYS AT OUR EXPENSE. you people don’t need cell phones, they’re what’s wrong with society  now. what we need is a sort of genuine  fight club mentality and let this corporate aholes know what it’s like to decide between feeding the family or lining a CEOs pocket. I for one would love seeing T-Mobile, Verizon and all the other crooked companies burn to the ground, if you burn it the masses will follow. Your day will come you criminals, light a match

DO NOT SIGN UP FOR T-MOBILE INTERNET, IT IS NOT WHAT ITIS ADVERISED TO BE, NOT EVEN CLOSE??
They keep telling everyone that the PROBLEM IS WITH YOUR TOWER AND THEY ARE WORKING ON IT??  Do believe them, this problem, as you can see by the reviews, is a NATIONWIDE ONE NOT A LOCAL ONE. Only a few days with them and i am getting rid of them like i would a BAD APPLE IN MY BARREL!!!!!!!!   Charles     Amarillo, Tx      You will have  pure TROUBLE WHEN TRYING TO RETURN THEIR EQUIPMENT  Plus your blood pressure will get a darn good workout with all the stories you will get from all the EXPERTS you will have to go through, most of which you cannot even understand them and they definitely don't understand you, cannot even get an email address correct for the paperwork to return their equipment!!  of course, if not returned within a certain period of time THEY WILL CHARGE YOU FOR NOT RETURNING IT!!  DOES THAT RING TRUE AS A REASON FOR NOT ASSISTING IN GETTING IT RETURNED??  dARN RIGHT IT DOES, MORE OF YOUR MONEY IN THEIR COFFERS, WE ARE ALSO CHANGING THE CELL PHONE PROVIDER, I WANT AS FAR AWAY FROM THIS OUTFIT AS I CAN GET, MY SANITY DEPENDS ON IT, YOUR WILL TOO, WHEN YOU HAVE TO GO THROUGH ALL THIS BULL STUFF!!!!!!   A SOLID WEEK HAS GONE BY ON THE RETURN ISSUE AND I STILL HAVE NOT GOTTEN THE RETURN LABEL FROM T-MOBILE?? 
ALL THIS IS SO DARN RIDUCULOUS THAT IT HURTS AND SO UNNECESSARY FOR A COMPANY OF THIS SIZE, BUT REPUTATION PROCEEDS THEM JUST KEEP CHECKING TRUSTPILOT, HALF THE NATION IS HAVING PROBLEMS WITH THEM AND GETTING WORSE!!!!!!

My  complaint is that I have just put in a claim yet again for another faulty device of the same brand and I'm not real happy about that instead of looking through the history seeing what happened with the first one and now the second one is a little is worse and saying oh well let me see if I can upgrade you to a different brand, I get the representative telling me well I would recommend taking the news new one in and upgrading it for a different one so you don't have to go through this again. I like T-Mobile and I like the fact that they have good service but this is my only complaint about that is why should I have to use my upgrade on a faulty device that is not my fault or figure out if there's a way to upgrade me to a different brand,  I think that's wrong she should have talked to a supervisor or figured out a way to get a different one because again this will be my third phone that I don't want to keep due to the issues that I'm having with the last two. I now have to use my upgrade on a phone that I don't want to keep 
 because I'm afraid I'm going to have  another issues with that one when  she could have went ahead and said let me talk to a supervisor and see if I can maybe upgrade you to a different brand since this is going to be the second time you've had a defaulty device with this manufacturer issues, because somebody didn't want to go that extra step to figure out and see if I could get an upgrade to a different brand I am leaving this review I don't ever leave reviews but this one I am leaving because I'm not happy if I could change to a different phone company I would.....

My issue is with the 55.00 Internet that tmobil is advertising. It is a 100% SCAM- I was told 2 weeks trial for free, the commercial advertise the same, but the company bills you from the day you take the modem and do not apply the discount.  When I called the toll free # on the bill the customer service is in the Philippines -  and they would not send me a cancel bill nor a letter stating that I do not have their Internet service. I returned the modem 7 days later because it was not good for gaming! Please be aware of this SCAM!

Was a sprint customer that got forced into the stupid merge. Phone service was so bad I cancelled and went to another provider. They continued to "auto" bill me for the next 3 months, one for $165+ and now they don't want to refund my money. I have spent 8+ hours dealing with support and billing, many have thick accents that are hard to understand. Alex transferred me to a manager, Zues, who hung up on me when I told him I'd be leaving a bad review when he wasn't going to refund my $100 of the $265+ that was due. Save your time, money, and psychological well-being by going somewhere else.
25 year customer and service just completely sucks now!!

Was a sprint customer that got forced into this stupid merge. In the last six month i have probally spent 80 or more hours dealing with support who first off barely speaks english normaly that wouldnt be a problem as long as the issue gets fixed but thats part of the problem it never truely does. The service has gone to crap they had to have sold off cell towers or something because i no longer get signal. Will be switching to verizon as soon as my 2 phones are paid off.

T-Mobile has no support worth using! Cellular data runs out fast and takes days to get back high speed! Every time I try to order some thing on line, my debit card is used by some one unknown! Every thing concerning T-Mobil STINKS!

edits.text: My phone was hacked from day one! I send feedback and my location comes up Mecklinberg County N. C. or Charlotte, N. C. Zip code 28010! My zip code is 29123 in Lexington County S. C. Support is useless in getting this fixed! Support tech has an accent that makes communicating hard! THAT IS OUT SOURCED FOR YOU, TOTALLY WORTHLESS!

text: Two billing cycles into being a Very new T Mobile customer and have had to call in each time..I went with the Magenta 55 plan and the home internet..So for me basic arithmetic  seemed simple enough. $70+ $50= $120 right.. Not at Tmobile.. first month I was billed $196 and at the second bill was down to $155..Turns out the free promotional line that I was promised in store was actually not but yet nobody seem to pay attention to my complaints and were consistently charging me an additional $35 for the Third free line..This line was presented to me as being a New customer making the move to Tmobile..during the signing up for Tmobile phone and internet service. First call in to correct the first $196 dollar bill was well over an hour driving down the Freeway..Second bill of $155 took yet another 40 minutes to get that corrected..I found that by giving surveys of Consistent Zeros gets you a actual call from a Supervisor..So At 11:00 am on a Sunday (today) July 3rd, 2022 Holiday weekend to resolve the issue only to state that the Promotional free line that was promised to me would be cancelled because my plan did not qualify for it..So yet again my bill would need to be credited/adjusted to reflect the now not free promotional line! 15 mins later I received an automated text saying the Alleged Free Promotional Line had been cancelled..In 15 Minutes Tmobile was able to shut off a Free Promotional line but took 3 calls and 3 billing cycles to maybe get the bill correct! My best guess was his call was  not to improve customer service on the side of Tmoble but to get that free line shut off.. Tmobile commercials they make switching to them easy..They are actually making it quite easy for me to move to one of there Competitors!!

Would leave zero if that was an option. Set up account on 5/23/22 at local T-Mobile store after being told 5G service was available.  Unable to establish service after numerous attempts.  Returned to store on 5/23/22, returned device, closed acct, and was assured no charges would occur.  However, received bill in mail.  Called T-Mobile on 5/31/22.  Was assured acct was closed and charges were cleared.  Received 2nd bill for 2 months’ service plus late fees.  Called 7/02/22 and have been told matter has been resolved.  Hope there’s not another bill.

Ive been with Tmobile for 20 years and overall I have been satisfied with their service.  However, last week I called about a problem with my iPhone.  The rep was unable to help me, so I told them I wanted to talk to Apple support.  They transferred me to Apple - as soon as I got on the phone they asked for my Apple ID.  I knew Apple never asks for your Apple ID.  I hung up and called the number I had for apple.  Apple immediately sent me a text verifying they were apple without me giving them any information.  My problem, was resolved.  My concern is if Tmobile transfers their customers to a fake apple rep they could be compromisng their personal information.

Ordered 2 sim cards over phone . Never got them, but they had NO trouble taking 60 bucks from us and we are elderly on SS. Straight talk does not charge a " one time fee", I call. After 5 people who dont speak english well I get a supervisor. He tells me to hold , he will order more sims. Wait half hour. He FINALLY comes back. Says he cant as that would put 8 cards on my order instead of 4. Wait... FOUR !!!  I never asked for FOUR.  So now another hour while he trys to find out how that happened. Has to then call me back. NEVER does.  I call back. 5 more people I explain why I called. 2 hours later. Get a lady. Oh SO SORRY, no worries, ( heard that 100 times) Do you still want that apple watch?  WHAAATTT!!!!  apple watch? Who the hell put 4 sims and a watch on MY bill?  NOT ME !! We will have to do a investigation. ( which never happened even after months) Oh so sorry, we took those off and will send TWO sims. No worries.  Well, they did not show up but the first ones finally did !!  I call. YES AGAIN.  6 people now, 2 hours... supervisor finally. I tell them to shove it and cancel everything !  After half hour of them trying to talk me into staying, they say they cancelled my account and will refund my 60. THEY NEVER DID.  Yep, you guessed it. Call back AGAIN. Where is my refund?  ( after 5 people and 1 hour) OH.... I seeeeee, they credited your acount. !  Wait, do you not know the difference between a credit and refund? How can you credit a close account?   Oh, we cant close it till your bill is paid that is due soon. WHAT BILL !!!! I never had any service !!!!  Oh, well we start charging you from the day you ask for the sims.  Me... you charge me for service I dont have yet?  NO WORRIES we Refund you now. But we need you checking numbers. Why? that is the only way we can do it. ( not what they told me last time) I reluctantly give it. You will see it in 3 business days.  Even gave me a reference number NOPE !!   annnnddd... I call back ! Where is my refund. ( 5 people later) we need to transfer you to Order Support. Wait 45 minutes more ( 2 hours now) Guy comes back. They answered but transferred HIM !! He works on it for another 45 minutes. Then says... we will issue a gift card. But only if its approved, oh and your last refund was denied. You know , the one I had the confirmation number for !   So yea, like they will approve THIS one. To add insult to injury I get a bill in the mail for 50 bucks !!! For what you ask? my first month of non service of course. The guy asks how do I want to pay it. I literally said.. are you kidding me ? I NEVER HAD A NUMBER,,, EVER !!! why the hell should I pay you 50 MORE when Im still trying to get the 60 back you ripped me off to begin with !!!  So another half hour and he took that off and..... closed my account. The one that was already closed last time. I KNOW I will be getting another bill in the mail. Each time I call I get the run around. My account is never closed, they just LIE to me. The 50 is never taken off. And the refund is NEVER given. LIES after LIES. I had to cancel my debt card and the bank said if they try to hit up my checking they will file a fraud deal. But cant get my 60 back cause I authorized it.

2 months after transferring to Verizon they still keep charging me and every time they promise it's the last bill. Terrible service,  Terrible and dishonest people! And I get all this after surviving them for 10 years! Beware of this fraudulent company!

Been with T mobile since sprint merged with them. 0, and I mean Zero problems
With Sprint. Since “converting” I have had more problems on a daily basis. Getting someone on the phone that can actually help is next to impossible. Stay away.

I would rather use 2 tin cans and a string over this so called cellular service provider. Talking to them every month for hours is excruciating trying to get any ethical answer from a representative or even the same answer. Go pull your fingernails out with pliers it’s less painful. The issues we encountered were getting charged for our phones on a promotional trade in every month and being told different reasons by multiple agents. Finally I was able to speak to a supervisor who was kind enough to understand our frustration. They amicably canceled our contract, unlocked our new phones to transfer back to Verizon with the commitment from us that we would continue to pay for our devices at 0 interest. Not that I wanted to continue to deal with this company but it was a responsibility I accepted. All went fine on autopay until June 2022 where I received a call stating we owed money to which I replied she was correct. She stated it was for a home router. Funny because we full time RV and could never get home internet. I asked are you sure it’s for a home router and not a mifi and two phones. Nope she said I’m sure it’s for a home router. I stated I never purchased one only the mifi and two phones. She said she would turn it in to their fraud department and they would call if any questions. Two weeks later our account was sent to collections. I called to ask why and the agent then said it was for two phones and a mifi. I stated that it’s an auto payment how can that be? He replied that the system auto closed our account because we didn’t have any number lines. I then asked if this could be reinstated to which he replied it’s already in collections nothing he could do and ghost I’d have to accept the tarnished credit and pay the agency. I asked for a supervisor, the agent said he already asked and there’s nothing they could do. I said I’d like to hear that from an agent supervisor. He’s busy I will take your information and he will call. I said I will wait that’s ok I have the time. Guess what? A supervisor was on the line with me in seconds. The supervisor stated he wished I would have spoken to him first so could have fixed it. He opened a complaint ticket gave me the number and stated he would look into it there is a way they can pull it back. A week later we get another call from the collections agency. I filed a complaint with the BBB. I received a call from T-mobile and wouldn’t you know they don’t see it as there fault. Good luck if you use them I hope you have time to waste and never get back. Their commercials are a joke and should e banned for false advertisement. I cringe when they come on.

edits.text:
This is the worst company for customer service. We just joined because of all the perks. We chose the Magenta max 55+ 2 lines and a mini. Offer was to give us 820 for rack of our IPhone 11 Pro Max for the iPhone 12 Pro Max. The phones were 1099 per we payed a down payment of 99 per phone leaving 1000 per phone or 2000. To get the 830 per phone a portion comes off the cost of the new and the rest is credited on your bill over the next 2 years. Our final bill was to be 195 per month for the 2 lines, 2 phones both with 20g hotspot and a midi with 100g. We ordered the screen protectors and added the insurance for both. Quite the deal at 197 where we were paying 187 per month for just 2 unlocked 11 pro maxes with 10g per phone. Our first bill was 193 with t-mobile. Second bill was 237! Called to straighten it out and no one could help. I spent 4 hrs on my Sunday after working 73 hours that week and another 3 hrs again on the following Tuesday. Finally found out we were being charged for 4 lines and never received our trade in discount.Horrible customer service and when you get someone there’s actually roosters crowing in the background. If I could rate my experience for the first two months as a customer I’d give it a -10 if they gave me that option. 1 more month I’m paying off my devices and going back to Verizon.Trying to explain the actual price I was quoted a195 and why someone in their right mind would switch to pay more (237) just didn’t make sense to anyone at t-mobile. I wouldn’t recommend this company if it was the last cellular provider on earth. Don’t let the fancy commercials fool you. 
20 years with Verizon never had an issue. Two months with t-mobile and I have been on the phone with people that read from a script to try to calm down their customers. I have more to the story but don’t have the time or patience without getting more aggravated. I work in telecommunications and install the equipment in the cell towers, trust me stay away!

text: Service, what service? They have 5G So long as you’re really close to a tower. Sitting in my living room i have 1 bar lte and drop calls. When I go to my vaca home THERE IS NO SERVICE. When I call they tell me the  tower is under construction and can’t give me a competition date. This has been going on for a year now. Six months ago I was told they would supply me with a signal booster, still waiting for it. Company is useless.  I am so regretting I switched companies.

I have never had a "manager" of a location treat me the way I did. About 15 hours in store location finally got all our phones working. They r slimy people. Lie to get a sale. I then was transfered to the dude above the manager and he treated me like crap. I was talked down to bc I am a women. Took two months to figure my plan out. The idaho falls ammon location is crap.

This company is a rep-off!! Never get there service they always playing mind games with your hard earned money! If they say your bill is $125.00 you’ll will eventually owe them $160.00 for all their hidden fees, normally a phone carrier will charge one set fee, Not these guys! Take my advice and avoid these pathetic company, by all means necessary! Thank me later. I can’t wait to get away from them, Never again… They don’t care about you or how your service is running, they ONLY CARE ABOUT YOUR MONEY!!! And how much extra they can swindle you out of BEWARE!!!!!!!!!!’

edits.text: Sprint/T-mobile are con artist at its best ! I wish bad for both company’s I hope they go out of business greedy as people that lie to get your service. Once you lock in with them, it becomes a nightmare, and their service sucks metro is way better any other phone service is. If you want to sleep good at night, never choice any one of these guys, they’ll rip you off! And tell you a lot of stuff is free ! Then they’ll charge you later for it. I have two phone cases for $200 that there employee supposedly gave to us. But that was a lie. I could have went on Amazon and bought the same case for $20 bucks all together. But who pays or charges $200 for cheap phone case. I did, but I didn’t know I was been charged until 2 months later. So beware of false advertisement this should be against the law. And I’m angry about it too ! I hate to write reviews but these guys deserved it 😈👿👹👺🤡 this company will be your enemy. Be smart take my advice ! And never 👎🏽👎🏽👎🏽👎🏽👎🏽👎🏽 do business with them, ever! I hate people that gets over on other people because they can. It sucks ☹️

text: have been waiting at t mobile store in stillwater mn for over an hour  no one has been served because they only have one person working. whoever does schedule  should be fired.

If it was up to me I’d leave the stars blank. Worst experience I’ve ever had is with this company. Since it was voice stream. I have been with T-Mobile for years and all they do is continue to lie to the consumers and over price them for bills that are completely out of no where. You don’t have to have a bill to wake up owing T-Mobile $1,700/$916/$781. Every other day. The supervisor always say I’ll give you my complete arruruces that by the end of this call you will hílame resolve the issue. For over three months now I returned 2 iPhone 13 pro max 512 gigs and they have the devices and still billing me for them.

The worst service l ever had.
I had Sprint for over 15 years and had to switch to T-Mobile (not by choice of course) and l didn't find Sprint to begin with to have the best service but at least the customer service experience l had with them wasn't that bad. L was hoping that with the merger l will get better reception but wishful thinking, l got a much worse reception and much much worse customer service.
I had been suffering with bad reception in my area, can not call my kids, have dropped calls, can not email or send pictures easily, have to step out of my house during the middle of the winter to be able to place a call and even that didn't work all the time.
I called three times and each time spend more than an hour with a T-Mobile representative (out if the country) and each time l was promised a booster box to better my reception but to no avail, no booster box ever was delivered.
I called many T-Mobile stores in my area trying to find a solution but no one can help except l was told that l need to upgrade my phone to a 5g newer one since l still have only a 3g or 4g (not sure) and by doing that my problem will disappear. The store got me upgraded to another phone and after paying $370 (that was just the difference for the upgrade, l supposedly saved a whopping $1000) and was assured that l will have a much better reception and no more dropped calls. Guess what? The reception was even worse than before and l am having more dropped calls thank before and now l have to, almost every time, step out of my house to, try, to make a call.
Most deceiving agents (must be commission bases), worst service ever.
Wouldn't recommend it to anyone and wish there was a choice for NO star.
