text: T-Mobile internet service is terrible. First the billing department can’t even put the correct information in when you give them your payment information took 4 times to get it right then they try to overcharge you for their screw ups when you sign up for the $50 plan. Then the system itself is horrible the modem Wi-Fi cuts out constantly and no solutions to fix the issues. These companies just steal your $ and provide poor service.

I've been a T-Mobile customer for 3 months. I came from Boost because they had the phone I wanted. What I lost is actual coverage AND gained a TERRIBLE signal. I work in the gig economy so when my apps can't connect to the internet WHILE DOING MY JOB, that is a huge problem. Legit. Go anywhere else other than this company. I am just counting down the months to get TF away from them. Terrible!

Since T mobile bought out sprint,service has been terrible, we did have coverage at first, now we have NO coverage at all, ive been to the t mobile locations in the area and they say there is nothing that they can do ,towers changed ???  Then why did you buy sprint ,they offer Nothing. I just wish someway I could get the attention of who ever regulates this phone company,,we have 4 lines and pay a boat load of money monthly but have no phone service at home. T mobile you suck,,your company has no clue and I hope and pray you go belly up bankrupt , maybe the 2 mile range walkee talkee is a more suitable for you as a company ! I want something done or I want a refund !

I called to order cell phone service.  The sales reps speak English well. The rep convinced me to try their “TV”.  She did not tell me it was only streaming which we do not do. The internet tower she talked me into will not work in our basement.  As I was trying to set up the cell phones every single person I talked to had such a strong accent I could not understand them.  Their English was not good enough for them to make coherent statements.  I finally packed everything up and took it all back to a T-Mobile store.  The reps there were very helpful in getting the account cancelled and making a label so the equipment could be returned.

I had bad experience with them.  I went to sell them my iPhone 11 and to get The iPhone 13 and I had the money to pay it all off and I told the lady I want to pay the phone off, so I don’t have a payment on this phone and it’s mind, so when we call a couple week later to see the monthly payment, there was a 8$ thing and was a payment monthly for the phone and call them and was arguing with them and then they was like we will take care of it, so today I wanted to switched and the lady said once again I had charged to my phone and I was so mad.  I’m so done with T mobile and Sprint. When I get the money, am going to pay it off and then called them that’s day and get what I need and never coming to them again and I will never Sell my phone again.

THE WORST & their company is built on LIES ! They are not qualified to have customers. they care about the money not your budget. I’ve had them twice. First time I was a teenager they lied about the family plan we we’re getting saying it would only be 140/monthly after that first month we never seen a $140 bill again. This time around they had a security breach my information was stolen & put on the dark web ! Never got compensated & they STILL wanted me to pay my bill! Every time I’m late with my payment they send a text telling me I owe $200 extra dollars and my bill is only $148. Then they’ll tell you the billing cycle is 30 days when really it’s 20 ! They’re a bunch of LIARSSSS !!!
This outfit could not get their act together. No matter who you are, this company is NOT QUALIFIED to have YOU as a customer. Pick another provider. Robert Wood

So...I'm not this type if person but felt it necessary to speak about thus.  I am currently with Verizon and was trying to switch to tmobile.  Well I went in there in February and inquired about the process.  The manager of the location said "why don't we get you Sim cards with a number assigned and when you're ready, it will be easy to transition."  I said welll...I suppose.  They said it wouldn't cost me a thing but wanted me to be able to take advantage of the deal they had going on.  Well to my surprise, I received a bill for services that I NEVER used totally $300 something dollars.  I went in the store again and said, I haven't moved anything over yet, why do I have a bill??? I was NEVER told it would incur charges.   The rep there called and spoke to 4 different people trying to resolve it.  After about an hour and a half there, the rep said give it 90 days and you should be good to go!  A week ago, I received a bill for $526.00.  Soooo..I go into the store again and the rep called again.  They said "well you activated the account so there is nothing we can do.  We provided a service, not our issue if you didn't use them." They said you'll have to pay that bill.  I said wellll that's not happening! She suggested I call customer service myself.  I tried calling and got an overseas rep and they couldn't talk to me because i didn't have a pass code for an account I NEVER activated.  I went back in the store AGAIN today and spoke to a nice guy who tried helping.  I explained this story to them for the millionth time.  They opened a fraud case to review because I NEVERRRR wanted anything activated.  The rep at the store took it upon herself without my knowledge.  Funny enough...ALL the reps who were involved no longer work there.  All I can say is don't EVERRRR use t-mobile. #tmobile #dontusetmobile.
My T-Mobile Internet isn't working password isn't working the customer service couldn't even give me a new password to login 😡😡😡

T MOBILE is a horror showa

DO NOT DO BUSINESS WITH THEM
Five different service reps LIED TO ME and all the lies were different.
I wanted to get their 5G internet and have both our phones switched to T mobile  AND get T-Mobile internet Email addresses for my self and spouse
Th first rep was absolutely  certain I’d have no issues. She was going to call us back after we checked our existing contracts for termination fees.
She never called us back.
Meanwhile I got the “gateway ( it’s really a 5-G smartphone in a box with its own phone number)  I got it up and running  it was OK;  FAST as hell but only as fast as the sending website so nothing was really all that much better.  So even though OOKLA speed test said I was whizzing along at 400 & sumpin’ Mbps the sites I’d download from were slow, so the internet was still slow. 

The second Rep was less certain he demurred refusing to give me  a clear response to the email questions.

A third rep told me that I could get an email but only one per account  she was adamant that T-Mobiles policy was one email per account.   And since my wife was gettng a T-Mobile Phone accont she was golden for an email.

A fourth rep told me  that My new T-Mobile.net or .com email addresses would appear on my account profile in a day or so.

A fifth Rep told me that  My T-mobile Account ID was an email account. She put me on hold twice for 5 minutes.

FINALLY after demanding a supervisor and then another;  Yah the supervisor was equally  useless I got an English speaking guy who sounded like Mister Slicker than snot  used car sales guy. I told him what I was trying to accomplish and he told me 
NO ONE GET A T-MOBILE EMAIL ACCOUNT EXCEPT T-MOBILE EMPLOYEES and had no explanation for why I was being lied to.

I killed the service and am sending them back their stinkin’ “Gateway” device.
DO NOT DO BUSINESS WITH T MOBILE 

Now here is the rub. All that back and forth I think is because marketing designed a system that is so ponderously  confusing that the customer will just give up and go get a  G-mail account.   The fob you off misinform you tell different stories   it’s all too much  BUT BUT  finally when I told ‘em I was done   it didn’t take ‘em but ten seconds to switch off  that Gateway device. 
So they really do know what they are doing.  They are lying scum.

This started when me and my children went in to get on a family plan 3 phones for $140 is what they promised us. It was like that for the first month then the second month they went up to almost 170. We had to constantly argue with them every month as they lied to us. Now they have gone and turned me over to collections as we had stopped service with them because they could not hold their promise to us. Big Tech at its finest and I have the worst service

just spent over 2 hours on the phone with them trying to get a transfer PIN so we could move to Xfinity.  No one knew what they were doing, no one had authority to address the issue and the final guy flat refused to give me a transfer PIN.  this all after they “blocked” the transfer without our knowledge or consent.  Just a terrible company.  this is only one of the many issues we have had with them

I tried T-Mobile years ago and service was horrible.. now in 2022 it’s actually Improved quite a bit but the reason for my review is customer service.. with such a big company expanding more and more fhe customer service is horrible.. no when you call you always get someone who speaks broken English in another country and in the background it sounds like there are hundreds speaking another language.. to me this is not professional at all.. T-Mobile claims top tier service and top tier customer service.. hate to say the customer service is way below sub par.. it’s horrible

Been with Sprint for over 20 years. Nightmare ever since dealing with T-Mobile. Service is exceptionally horrible. Four calls totaling approx seven hours to get a replacement phone working with no solution. Continually jacked around. Will be going elsewhere. Do yourself a favor and go with a different provider.

the absolute worst coverage area I have ever had. The customer service agent on the phone when I went to cancel my internet service hot spots basically said you cannot and your stuck with us. I basically had to stop paying the bill until they contacted me. They are about the worst of the worst. Use tin cans or smoke signals before going to T mobile

So I switched from Verizon to T-Mobile about a week ago, and I have made a huge mistake. The text take 10-15min to go threw, calls seem to drop mysteriously  & to top it off the employees at the store here in Norfolk,VA. Acted like it was a joke & our unprofessional. We had to go back to the store 5X to try to get things worked out. These are supposed to be the Newest best phones they have to offer. I've been with them a month & already have been lied to twice & Have yet to receive the credit they promised on my bill. Just frustrating you get what you pay for. & this is there best option of data available. Tragic. Slower then Verizon in all aspects. Now they want to swap all all of my family's phones. Huge inconvenience. & how do you get 3 bad phones?? Galaxy S22+ & Ultra?

I am a small business owner in town and I go to the local Oxnard T-Mobile at the Esplanade center. I absolutely love the staff they are so enormously helpful and honest which is hard to come by these days. The manager Jesus always treats us like we’re family and when we walk in the door they say our name and they all really seem like they want to do their utmost to make you happy that seems to be the very most important thing which I appreciate a lot because I’m always really happy especially when I walk out of there with a new thing. I’ve been going to Sprint for years and I’m excited to see all the T-Mobile has to offer us  as we transition from sprint to T-Mobile. I remember the days that when I was at my office I couldn’t except square payments because I had no Internet and now I do even though I don’t pay extra it’s on my phone and I like that. I really like the service and customer service when I call is also exemplary  and I appreciate that. I just came on here to just praise the Oxnard team mobile with manager Jesus . It’s awesome To go to a contemporary store and feel the hometown feeling by way of customer service. Thank you so much from Patti

T-Mobile broke its support for LG phones through ineptitude and hasn't fixed the problem in over a month.  The official fix apparently doesn't even apply to my LG G6, which does not have the system app the instructions apply to; a software update supposed to fix the problem isn't offered to me.  The error message reads "Unfortunately LG IMS has stopped.", but the problem is definitely due to T-Mobile, not LG; the error does not occur without a T-Mobile SIM inserted.  I'm borrowing a friend's AT&T SIM to check, but LG phones are apparently malfunctioning only on T-Mobile's network.  Even though LG stopped making phones over a year ago, T-Mobile has very many customers who use them -- just incredible incompetence to have rolled out an update that broke support for LG phones in the first place and abject not to have solved the problem in a month!  I just have a T-Mobile SIM, so T-Mobile doesn't even consider me a customer.  I'm not buying a new phone because of T-Mobile's incompetence and rapacity; if the problem isn't resolved very soon, I'll just switch carriers.

This company has undoubtedly the worst customer service on the planet. No one in the company LISTENS. Not the customer service line and especially not the store in Lakewood Colorado. Forget to tell me about the 55+ lines? Yes. Not listen when say I want a different phone? Check. The salespeople in this store could care less about listening to their customers. Watched unhappy people come and go just ad we did.

Tmobile is only about money. They care nothing about the customer. If you go in the store the reps are not knowledgeable of anything but to sell you the phone after that you must call in to customer service, which should be called get more money by talking sweet team, to get any help. Their insurance company assurant is just the same A RIP OFF!!!! Definitely searching for a better company.

Horrible horrible customer service. Long waits then you get reps Who Definitely Cannot speak English very well and you spend hours being passed around from one rep to another. I "chatted" in chat on their site. TOLD "Gerda" that I had just been approved for ACP and needed internet service. She Checked to make sure my address was covered, Said Yes your address is covered. Sold me the 50.00 plan unlimited. Then told me I also qualified for a free Chromebook computer! She tried 'giving ' me headphones for an additional 7.00 a month. I AGAIN said no with the 50. plan and ACP 20.00 was all I could afford as I am a Senior on a limited income. All I had to do was sign the contracts she would email me, this all took about 2 hours.. went to sign and had a question so called t mobile was connected to a different rep JOHN ROMER . I told him had a question about the contract. Put me on hold and came back Again wanted to check my address and said I was covered and with the ACP my 50. bill would be 20.00. AND I also qualified for a  Samsung tablet!!! All I had to do was sign The new contract he would send me, and pay the 89.00 taxes. Thrilled I signed the contract. The tablet and computer arrived within a week!! But there was no Gateway, a device to hook it all up to to internet. Again called And got another agent told her again my address And she checked and explained I was on the ACP program. She said My Address Was Not Covered but she would send me a different device and it would all work, all I had to do was call in and activate everything when it came. Week later got a device called a hotspot. Again called in again a different agent and was then told that TMOBILE does NOT ACCEPT ACP!!  but I could just pay the 50. a month. Went through my whole story again, now for fourth time. Told them I had been given these devices and Sold a plan, signed a contract they needed to hold up their end. From there for two weeks tried getting everything worked out, many barely English speaking agents lots of biting my tongue, Hours on hold. And each time repeating my story, then being transferred to a floor supervisor again repeating story and then was told I had to Send everything back or pay the 50. a month. From there gave it a couple days because I was sick and called in again this time a three hour phone call, very very frustrated and finally to my great embarrassment just crying my eyes empty. This guy John puts me on the line with a Big Supervisor and again everything all over second time and we go round and round. She then gets frustrated puts me on hold forever and comes back and says please just give me your ACP number, keep the devices, you will receive a bill for 20.00 each month. It was extremely late I was exhausted and could not find the email with my ACP number. I ask if I could call her back in the a.m when I found my number. She agreed. I said hold on, how do I know I will get you in the morning do you have a number I need to call?? SHE said No SHE HAD EVERYTHING DOCUMENTED all I had to do is call my number in. Next morning two more reps two more stories then was told by a new supervisor that the only thing documented was that I was refusing to return the devices!!! This led to a MONTH long back and fourth a hundred times repeating myself and getting nowhere and being told my bill was $140.00 a month And I had two accounts!!. Furious  I told them send me a label, cancel everything, and I would box it up and return it. They disagreed said I had to take it to a physical store!! After waiting an hour or longer in two different stores was told they cannot take back anything not physically sold from their store . Another week goes by took it to Citadel Mall in Chas SC and was told the same thing, Nick HURRAH NICK the manager went beyond the call of duty, he first said same thing, I was so tired of telling all this over and over I just broke down. He took matters in his own hands, contacted higher ups, printed me a label, gave me a receipt and all I had to do was drop it off at UPS. He cancelled my service, told me they were charging me for 3 lines, one to internet, one to each device they sent me!!!  THANK YOU NICK!!! He is a super hero!! So to conclude Horrible salesmen that will tell you anything to get you to sign on Even Lie, horrible customer reps from another country that you cannot understand hours spent being bounced around. And had to return things I was given . If you are determined to use this company you better find yourself a "Nick" to handle anything.

COMMISSION COMMISSION COMMISSION
Don't.Just Don't! I went in for my promo free Tuesday socks and she informed me that I was specifically chosen to receive their free Internet. I was tired and didn't have my guard up for SCAMMER'S. So I took the box, or the hook I should say. Anyways I already have a service with my landlord. Here comes the FUN part: I came back in 24 hours and was told I need to call this number (THAT WAS NO
LONGER IN SERVICE) because I couldn't return the box in the shop. I would have to get
a return shipping label by calling and waiting to explain the whole story. On top of that I WAS CHARGED $50 BUCKS!! So I had to clear up that Mess. Now the shipping label was sent via email and I don't have a printer. So now I need to ask someone to print it out for me because I have NOTHING BETTER TO DO!
BEWARE.THESE KIDS ARE ON THEIR PHONES AND YOU ARE Bothering them UNLESS THEY GET THEIR COMMISSION!!!!

You have a single line with these people , they offer you nothing , BUT to get their offers T-Mobile wants you to upgrade to a more expensive plan , tell me , WTH do you people actually do for the loyal customer who pays their bill every single month , not a damn thing ! "the u-carrier , that makes you pay for everything .
Every time we go in t-mobile in Muskogee ok. And we get a person named Candy she is snarky and not friendly at All. Can’t wait to go back to At&t

It truly amazes me how terrible this customer service is.  After seeing all the insane deals and ads going on, my Wife and I considered switching from ATT.  First, the suckered us in after our initial call - we thought this would be a quick process, less than an hour, but our first call turned out to be 3 hours long.  Promises and promises of devices at certain price points during our initial sign-up.  My Wife and I made sure we asked more than 10 times over the course of the conversation the deal they were offering with Magenta Max and the devices they would offering and the rep confirmed each time.

When it came time to pay, the price was 5x more then what was offered, even after we asked and confirmed the pricing numerous times for over 3 hours.  We proceeded to have to talk to a "Supervisor", they were able to fix a portion of the order and made us pay in separate transactions for the devices - this began to feel like a money grab.  After the first transaction, she had problems processing the next and simply hung up on us. Over the course of the next 3 days, we called T-mobile more than we ever called ATT over a 5 year span easily.  

From being hung-up on by customer service, to having to wait hours and hours just to speak with someone; to "experts" playing games and hold the phone on silent holds while they literally forget to put the phone on mute, I comment on them hearing them speak, they get quite and hang up anyways.  This is BY FAR the WORST experience I have ever had.  I have never filled one of these out, however, I urge and recommend anyone to stay away from T-Mobile, it simply isn't worth it; my blood pressure has literally risen from this whole scenario over the course of the past few days.

To top it off, I finally spoke with a half decent supervisor that calmed the situation down last night and ask me to reconsider and that this wasn't a normal occurrence.  My overly nice and understanding "Let me give them one more try" ass believed them and called back to activate the account - NOPE, took 2 hours just to attempt to activate the account, which was UNSUCCESSFUL.

I'm currently on hold as we speak since 720am "now 9:24am" to simply cancel the account and get refunded for the money spent and return labels for the devices PLUS cancel an account I haven't even activated and just now....just now after 8 calls and 7 hang-ups by reps, am I able to speak with someone who is "attempting" to assist me.

If you're switching from your current service, please don't do it.  IT IS NOT WORTH IT.  We will GLADY, with a massive smile, pay the extra $100-$150/mo for AT&T to avoid T-Mobile.  STAY AWAY FROM T-MOBILE! THEY'RE NOT WORTH IT & INCOMPETENT!

Children be good. If ever you were to die and go to Hell you will spend eternity being passed around from one rep to the other which is exactly how long it takes to resolve ANY problem you throw at them!   I used to have  a landline, my Husband still pays for it one year after it stopped functioning.  I ask, "please send me a phone or disconnect it"  I got "What is landline"?

Isn't there a 0 star? That's a  cryin' shame. I havenever in my life had a worse experience with a company. The cover to my lens shattered and I called Sprint to see what the repair would cost? The person who answered told me they didn't know and I would have to look it up. I did. $600+!!! I couldn't afford it so I went without a camera for months. In desperation I called to see if I was eligible for an upgrade and the person said "You have full insurance coverage!". I submitted claim and was given a seriously baffling run around by both Assurion and Assurant entities. At the end I received a statement saying I was not eligible because too much time had passed and therefore my claim was void. I also received an email saying that I had, the day after the claim, switched insurance companies from one to another (without my knowledge or consent!!!) ...and then afterwards, in yet another one of my excruciating fruitless conversations, an employee on the phone told me they were one and the same! I must have spent 55-65 hours on the phone with employees with absurd taglines such as 'Hello! This is Sunshine! How can I make your day more sunny?" Believe me when you have been on the phone for  several hours! with no results, prior numerous dropped calls by "managers", higher ups, , etc, that is the last freaking crap you want to hear! I cannot begin to tell you how many times I called Sprint with so called managers telling me that 'You are a valuable customer and something will be done to rectify this matter." and that they would call me back. So I would wait for scheduled call- some would then call me back and tell me to call someone else! The last two promised call backs where I was supposed to wait over the weekend and holiday for one - both never came. I have never in my life been so yanked around by any one entity or thing! I am now eligible for an upgrade but even as a senior on a below poverty income I am going to pay the $300 plus dollars to buy off the phone and get the hell as far away from this horrible company Sprint T-Mobile as I can!!!! Although they are difficult to search and find, when I look at reviews for Sprint they are all one star and Verizon is five star.
If I pay off my phone they won't pro-rate my bill either! I have been a customer of Sprint since 2005 and I am counting the days to the end of my billing cycle to pay the phone off and switch carriers. The fact that some absurd "rule couldn't be overridden" for a mistake that they made by not informing me I was paying full insurance monthly! shows that they cut NO profit margins to allow for decent and fair customer service. If they had even given me a brand new phone! the cost would have been minuscule compared to the free of charge negative PR that they will receive by me (enthusiastically and convincingly ) FOR ALL OF TIME!!!! Look at Sprint reviews and you will see people super frustrated after having received the same truly horrible horrible service that I did. I have only touched lightly on the frustrations and crap I have endured pursuing this for weeks on end and after having wasted, now, up to 80 hours on this, I am counting the days, no the minutes... until my billing cycle is up and I switch. To answer my own question? No, customer service  couldn't possibly get any worse. Hands down Sprint T- Mobile gets the prize for the  service of any company on earth.

I went with my Aunt to help her get off my uncle's (divorced) plan and get one of her own and also trade in her phone (within the 14 days) to get an easier, user friendly phone. We waited about 45 minutes to be helped, the last 10 minutes we were the only customer in the place and was being ignored. They help us and we explain what we need and they told us they can't do anything cause she's not an authorized user for that account. They were telling me that a 76 year old woman has to ask her ex husband to grant her access to not only trade her phone but also to free her number to get off his account! What?! What is the point of this? They need to change their policy cause this makes no sense! I can see if she's trying to get on his plan but she wants off! That's not going to be a pleasant conversation and who's to say he will do it? She's just stuck being on his line where he has access to her account but she doesn't to his? Do better T-Mobile!
T-Mobile has a HHP that helps you with your bill. Please don’t DO IT!!! Supervisor’s LIE and doesn’t return calls and talk over you. Please BOOST MOBILE the BEST!!!
After 12 years of being with sprint the poor customer service at tmobile drew me to leave. Dealt with their crappy service and internet.

DO NOT GO WITH SPRINT T MOBILE. THEY ARE HORRIBLE ONE OF THE WORST COMPANIES OUT THERE. 
 When I was with Sprint I had nothing but trouble they charged me for phones I didn't have they charged me for phones that I've sent back. They sent me to collection when I went to another company without giving me a final bill. After the collection compost said I had paid in full Sprint is still trying to charge me another bill. They do not keep records of what is said. They cheat their customers.

WORST CELL PHONE PROVIDER EVER. I joined 6 months ago, and have had nothing but problems. I pay my bill and yet, I still get texts saying I haven't paid it and get charged late fees. Terrible coverage. Each time there is an issue (and the issues are coming from Team Mobile), I have to spend HOURS on the phone trying to deal with the problems. Yet, nothing is ever resolved. I spent over an hour today and was treated VERY rudely by customer service team that is obviously overseas. They did NOT listen and kept repeating the same things over and over in  annoying sing song voices. I shouldn't have to argue with them over issues that are coming from Team Mobile system. On June 1st, I stupidly purchased a new iPhone SE 3rd generation from Team Mobile after my old iPhone was stolen, and when  got home I realized it wouldn't work on my old iMac because the USB port size has changed, so I couldn't sync my phone. I returned it the next day and was treated VERY rudely by staff at store 524 in Portland OR. The manager rolled her eyes at me. She said that "NO ONE" has SE 2nd generation phones anymore (not so, because I bought one at Best Buy later that night). Team Mobile staff will promise you anything to get you to sign up. I was overcharged and never got my full refund for chargers I returned. I was forced to pay a $40 re-stock fee, and they REFUSED to provide with any receipts for the cell phone I returned. BEWARE OF TEAM MOBILE! In an industry filled with liars and bad service, TM is the worst.

Chose T-Mobile because of the 5G coverage in my area. (Verizon and ATT maps show coverage but in reality don't exist. Verified with MVNO sims.) After using spotty MVNO online services it was a pleasure to walk into a T-Mobile store and sign up. I have had service for a year with no problems at all. I am on autopay and that works without a problem.
